metadata.title: The livestock platform for Moroccan farmers
metadata.description: Manage your farm profile and livestock registry with real, secure data.

common.phoneHelp: Use a valid Moroccan number. SMS verification is deferred in Phase 1.
common.passwordHelp: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
common.passwordTooShort: The password must contain at least 8 characters.

hero.title: Digitize your livestock management with confidence
hero.description: FellahLink gives Moroccan farmers a secure account, a structured farm profile, and a foundation for a reliable livestock registry.
hero.trustNote: Designed for mobile and slow rural connections
hero.artworkAlt: Moroccan farmer managing livestock with a digital tool

features.title: A lightweight interface built on real data from day one
features.registryDescription: Start with a valid name, phone number, and role.
features.growthDescription: Protected routes verify the active session with the API.
features.healthDescription: Region and province come from Morocco's validated list.
features.marketDescription: The foundation can grow without fake livestock or marketplace data.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your phone and password to restore your session.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register as a farmer or vet. Buyer and admin accounts are not public.
auth.sideTitle: Build the right foundation before expanding the registry and market
auth.sideDescription: Phase 1 connects registration, login, session restoration, and a real farm profile.
auth.featureOneDesc: Only farmers and vets can register publicly.
auth.featureTwoDesc: The current user is restored through /auth/me.

dashboard.summaryStatus: This protected dashboard covers the foundation of the platform.
dashboard.protectedDescription: This page uses /api/v1/auth/me and does not show fake herd statistics.
dashboard.profileMissingDescription: Complete your region and province before adding livestock records.
dashboard.profileReadyDescription: You can review and update farm data from the profile page.
dashboard.phaseNotice: The dashboard does not invent livestock or marketplace statistics.

profile.title: Complete your farmer profile
profile.subtitle: Enter the farm data used by the API to calculate profile completion.
profile.emptyDescription: Add a region and province to create your profile.
profile.farmerOnlyTitle: The farm profile is for farmers only
profile.farmerOnlyDescription: This protected area is only available to farmer accounts.
profile.locationHelp: The API validates that the selected province belongs to the region.
profile.informationCardText: The completion score comes from the API.

animals.title: Livestock registry
animals.description: Register and maintain the animals that belong to your farm.
animals.emptyDescription: Add your first animal to start tracking its identity, growth, photos, and health.
animals.failedLoad: We could not load your livestock registry.
animals.forbiddenDescription: Only farmer accounts can access and manage the livestock registry.
animals.missingDescription: This animal does not exist or is not available to this account.

form.subtitle: Use the animal's real information. Fields marked required are validated before saving.
form.ageMethod: How do you know the age?
form.positive: Enter a whole number greater than zero.
form.futureDate: The date cannot be in the future.
form.generalError: The animal could not be saved.
form.colorPlaceholder: For example, white with a black mark
form.notesPlaceholder: Visible marks or private identification details

detail.archiveDescription: Archive {animal}. It will be removed from your active registry and its detail page will no longer be available.
detail.archiveError: The animal could not be archived.

photos.title: Animal photos
photos.emptyDescription: Add a clear JPEG, PNG, or WebP photo of this animal.
photos.supported: JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Maximum 10 MB.
photos.unsupported: Choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
photos.oversized: The selected photo is larger than 10 MB.
photos.uploadError: The photo could not be uploaded.
photos.primaryError: The primary photo could not be updated.
photos.deleteDescription: This photo will be removed from the animal record.
photos.deleteError: The photo could not be deleted.

history.title: Animal history
history.emptyDescription: Registry activity will appear here as records are added.
history.error: The animal history could not be loaded.

growth.title: Growth tracking
growth.description: Track real weight measurements for this animal.
growth.chartEmpty: Add at least two weight records to see a meaningful growth chart.
growth.emptyDescription: Add the first measurement to begin tracking growth.
growth.error: Weight records could not be loaded.
growth.positive: Weight must be greater than zero.
growth.futureDate: The date cannot be in the future.
growth.addError: The weight measurement could not be added.
growth.duplicate: A weight already exists for this date.

health.title: Health records
health.description: Keep a factual history of vaccinations, illness, treatment, checkups, and notes.
health.emptyDescription: Add the first factual health record for this animal.
health.error: Health records could not be loaded.
health.descriptionPlaceholder: Record observations without giving a diagnosis
health.futureDate: The recorded date cannot be in the future.
health.addError: The health record could not be added.
health.noDiagnosis: This registry records information only and does not provide medical diagnoses or treatment advice.

footer.tagline: Livestock registry and market access for Moroccan farmers.
